name: CodeIntegrity - Blocked Image Load With Revoked Certificate
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: CodeIntegrity - Blocked Image Load With Revoked Certificate
SIGMA Description: Detects blocked image load events with revoked certificates by code integrity.

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3036 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY CodeIntegrity - Blocked Image Load With Revoked Certificate on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3036 AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: CodeIntegrity - Blocked Image Load With Revoked Certificate
